core_principles: Speed to Insight: 60-second rule for executive answers.
Density with Clarity: Maximum data per pixel without clutter.
Industrial Precision: Sharp edges, high contrast, no fluff.
Hierarchy First: Critical alerts (Code Red) scream, background info whispers.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-sm font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase text-sm px-6 py-2 hover:bg-primary-hover transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-neutral-300 text-neutral-900 rounded-sm font-medium text-sm px-4 py-2 hover:bg-neutral-50
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 text-white rounded-sm font-semibold text-sm px-4 py-2 hover:bg-red-700

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide

tables.header: bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-600 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider h-10

transitions.hover: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract server lights green, good for data flow backgrounds
White concrete building, clean industrial exterior

people.description: Man presenting data, good for reports section

industrial.description: Rack of electronic equipment, dark room

four_blocker.structure: grid grid-cols-2 grid-rows-2 gap-px bg-neutral-200 border border-neutral-200
four_blocker.cell: bg-white p-6 min-h-[300px] relative hover:bg-neutral-50 transition-colors
four_blocker.title: absolute top-4 left-4 text-sm font-bold uppercase text-neutral-500

risk_heatmap.cell: aspect-square flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold border border-white/50 cursor-pointer hover:scale-105 transition-transform

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS FIRST: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
THEME SETUP: Ensure tailwind.config.js uses the specific colors defined in 'colors' section, especially Primary #FE5B1B.
LAYOUT: Implement a fixed Sidebar (Dark) + Scrollable Main Content (Light) layout. Do not use a top navbar for primary navigation.
FOUR-BLOCKER: This is the core view. It must be a 2x2 grid. Top-Left: Strategic Initiatives. Top-Right: Operational Transformation. Bottom-Left: Code Red / Risk. Bottom-Right: Financials.
DENSITY: Reduce default padding in Shadcn components. Use 'compact' variants for tables.
CHARTS: Use Recharts. Style them with minimal grid lines (strokeDasharray='3 3') and use the brand colors.
CODE RED: This status must PULSE or have a distinct visual indicator (border-l-4 border-red-600).
NO ROUNDED CORNERS: Force 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none' on all cards and buttons. This is an industrial tool, not a social app.
DATA-TESTID: Every button, link, and input MUST have a data-testid attribute.
